name: Axxess Home Health Software API
what_it_does: Axxess REST API for cloud-based home health, hospice, and home care software platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient intake and clinical records, retrieve visit scheduling and caregiver assignments, access home health billing and Medicare/Medicaid claims data, track OASIS and outcome measures, manage care plan coordination, access payroll and scheduling data, and integrate home-based care data with payers, referral sources, and health systems.
use_cases: Managing home health patient records and care plans from clinical coordination agents
Automating visit scheduling and caregiver matching from home care operations agents
Processing Medicare home health billing and claims from revenue cycle agents
Tracking OASIS outcomes and quality measures from compliance reporting agents
not_for: Acute inpatient care without home-based care workflows
Non-clinical home care without skilled nursing or therapy services
Facility-based long-term care without home and community-based services
best_when: A home health agency, hospice, or home care organization using Axxess wants AI agents to automate scheduling, billing, outcome tracking, and care coordination workflows.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Patient clinical data is protected health information requiring BAA. Home health billing automation must comply with Medicare/Medicaid billing requirements. Clinical documentation automation requires clinical oversight.

auth.notes: Axxess uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Agency-level credentials with patient and caregiver data scopes. Partner program for technology integrations. FHIR-based interoperability available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — home health enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-patient monthly pricing; module-based pricing for billing, scheduling, clinical
pricing.notes: Dallas, Texas. Founded 2007. Cloud-native home health platform. 9,000+ home health and hospice organizations. Strong Medicare/Medicaid billing expertise. OASIS and outcomes focus. Major players in home health tech alongside Netsmart, WellSky, and Kinnser.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: All patient PHI access requires BAA and appropriate access controls
No public MCP server — REST API with partner program access
No webhooks — polling required for visit completion and clinical updates
Medicare billing compliance — home health billing errors risk claim denials and audits
OASIS data is federally mandated outcome measurement — handle with accuracy
Caregiver scheduling data includes PII and work authorization information
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient PHI and home health clinical data. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Medicare billing compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient PHI and home health data. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA and Medicare compliance required.
